content.en:
"Why, Lord Agu, you don't want to?"

Qin He asked.

"Of course I do!"

The lord of the country of Ogu answered.

Immediately, Qin He took the Lord of Aogu to Luoshen City.

On the way, Qin He saw the demon seed.

I saw that as soon as Qin He stretched out his hand, this demon seed fell into his hands.

"It's this demon seed, right?" Qin He asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded.

At this time, Qin He looked at the Lord of the Ao Gu Kingdom: "Lord of the Ao Gu Country, there is a demon seed raging, but you didn't kill him, why is this?"

"I was negligent for a moment!"

The lord of the ancient kingdom is dead and does not admit it.

Soon.

They came to Roselle City, but the Lord of Roselle was gone.

At this time.

Qin He found the blood relatives of the Lords of Luoshen, and searched for the Lords of Roselle through the power of the bloodline, plus one of his eternal treasures.

Even if only the remains remain, traces can be found.

Moreover, this kind of search cannot be stopped by the Lord of the Ancient Realm, unless the strength of the Lord of the Ancient Nation surpasses that of the Qin River.

Of course.

Qin He didn't care about the death of the Luo Shen City Lord, it was just an eternal Dao realm!

It's just that he was very curious about why the Lord of the Ancient Realm wanted to kill an ordinary Eternal Dao Realm.

Airplanes!!!!!

Through blood relatives, Qin He discovered that the source was in the Lord of the Augu Kingdom.

"Lord Ogu, what are you doing hiding an Eternal Dao Realm in your body?"

As he spoke, Qin He used the power of the Eternal Dao Seed to bless his eyes, and with an Eternal Primordial Treasure, his gaze instantly penetrated the body of the Lord of the Ancient Realm.

In normal times, Qin He would not be able to spy on the body of a country lord, which would offend the other party.

But now, the behavior of the Lord of the Augu Kingdom is too abnormal, and he also hunts down and kills the members of the Nine Extremes Alliance, so he has the right to punish the Lord of the Augu Kingdom.

"Not good!"

The face of the Lord of the Augu Kingdom changed drastically.

But it's too late.

I saw that Qin He's eyes pierced through the main body of the Ancient Kingdom, and he spied a body with an Eternal Dao Realm, although these Eternal Dao Realms had not yet died, they had sunk.

And Qin He also sensed a wisp of breath on the bodies of these Eternal Dao Realms.

"Eternal Soul Eater!"

Qin He was furious.

"Lord Aogu, you actually practice this forbidden technique, what do you want to do?" Qin He was not stupid, he deduced it a little, and guessed several possibilities, one of which was the highest.

The Eternal Soul Eater technique is to make the rejection between oneself and the Eternal Dao Seed or the Eternal Demon Seed disappear, and can control the power of other Eternal Dao Species and the Eternal Demon Seed, and will not cause the body to be repulsed.

And the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom himself has the Eternal Dao Seed, so why should he solve the problem of rejection?

Then, the biggest possibility is that the Ao Gu Kingdom mainly seized other Eternal Dao Species of the Eternal Dao Realm and replaced their own Eternal Dao Species.

Qin He had heard of the method of seizing the Eternal Dao Seed, but it was forbidden to do it, and once anyone did this, it would definitely be wiped out.

Why did the lord of the Agu Kingdom dare to do this, it was nothing more than that he wanted to live, so he took the risk.

"Lord Aogu, you caused the turmoil in the Demon Seed Abyss, take the opportunity to capture 10,000 Eternal Dao Realms for you to practice the Eternal Soul Devouring Technique, and then seize other Eternal Dao Species, replace your own Eternal Dao Species, and solve the problem of Eternal Dao Species. Qin He said coldly.

Lord Ogu knew that he couldn't explain it, and the matter had been exposed.

He hates!

So, he killed Ye Tian and wanted Ye Tian to be buried with him.

However.

Qin He directly stopped the Agu Lord, and only one blow shattered the Agu Lord.

The gap in strength between them is too big, and the Lord of Agu is not Qin He's opponent at all.

"Qin He, let me go, I don't want to do this, but my Eternal Dao Seed problem is too big, I can't reverse it!" the Augu Lord roared.

"Lord Agu Country, you can completely destroy your own Eternal Dao Seed, and the problem will be solved!"

Qinhe Road.

"Hahahaha, destroy the Eternal Dao Seed, my strength is not even as good as the normal Eternal Dao Realm, my enemies will bypass me? Who will protect me? Qin He, I am not you, you have a backer behind you, even if you can't truly transcend the Eternal Dao Realm, you still don't need to worry about the demonization of the Eternal Dao Seed, but I can't!"

The main road of the country of Oku.

"Lord Augoo, if they were all like you, they would have been messed up a long time ago!"

Qin He shook his head and said.

The lord of the Ogu Kingdom still did not give up, he burned the Eternal Dao Seed and quickly fled.

If he can escape, it doesn't matter if the Eternal Dao Seed has more problems, he still has a chance to replace the Eternal Dao Seed.

However.

In front of Qin He, the first speed of the Eternal Dao Realm, the Lord of the Ancient Realm was caught by Qin He before he could run for a moment.

Rumble!!!!

The Lord of Ogu was blasted into the depths of time and space, and was pressed by a hand, and his whole body was shattered.

In an instant, the Lord of Ogu was severely damaged.

Immediately.

Qin He left with the Lord of the Ao Gu Kingdom.

This time, the trouble caused by the Lord of Ogu was too great, so naturally he couldn't just die.

Subsequently.

Qin He came to Ye Tian's side and said, "Ye Tian, you have made a meritorious service this time, there will be a batch of rewards for you in the future, I will leave first." You go to the aid of other places and stop those demon seeds. "

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

......

Soon after.

Qin He took the Ancient Realm Lord to meet one of the top three Transcendent Dao Realm existences of the Nine Extremes Alliance, the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods!

The Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods is an existence that transcends the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm, and the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods is also far beyond the Ancient Realm.

"Master, the Lord of the Augu Kingdom has brought it!"

Before coming, Qin He informed the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods of the news.

Now.

The Great Lord of Ten Thousand Gods stared at Qin He, and immediately pointed at the eyebrows of the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom.

Soon.

The Lord of the Great Gods said: "Capture the Lord of the Tide River and the Lord of the Bloody Eye Dao!"

"Yes, Master!"

Qin He went to the ancient kingdom again to capture the tide river lord and the bloody eye dao lord.

It didn't take long for these two Eternal Dao Realms to be caught.

The three of the Ancient Lords, the Tide River Lords, and the Bloody Eyes were imprisoned, and after the Demon Seed Abyss Rebellion was resolved, they were publicly executed to the Ancient Lords, which was also used to warn against those Eternal Dao Realms who were secretly doing this kind of thing.

......

Lord of the Ogu Kingdom.

After Ye Tian discovered the demon seeds, he stopped them.

He could only deal with some of the weaker demon seeds and kill them one by one.

And more and more strong people are coming here to find those demon seeds one by one, and there are strong people like Qin He to deal with the top demon seeds.

Gradually, the number of demon seeds decreased considerably.

After instinctively sensing the threat, many demon seeds retreated into the abyss of demon seeds.

In this way, the turmoil in the Demon Seed Abyss also returned to calm.

Subsequently.

The Augur Realm Lord was publicly executed within the Nine Extremes Alliance, and they were directly exterminated, leaving no trace, which also made some of the Eternal Dao Realms afraid.
